title: HR Generalist
raw_jd: Support core HR operations for a 300-person company. Manage onboarding, employee relations intake, policy documentation, HRIS data quality, benefits coordination, and manager guidance. The role requires confidentiality, structured follow-through, and practical knowledge of HR processes.
expected_must_haves: Employee relations intake or manager support
expected_disqualifiers: No evidence of HR process ownership
scoring_notes: Strong candidates handle sensitive intake carefully and maintain reliable HR process documentation.
